prompt.name: S30.2 -- BKT 传播
prompt.role: 当 DiagnosticEngine 更新 BKT mastery 后, 调用 SkillGraph.propagate() 将增益传播到依赖该技能的技能。 传播率 30%: 父技能 mastery 提升 0.1, 子技能 prior 提升 0.03。
prompt.context: 改动: diagnostic_engine.py SkillMasteryStore.update() 方法中追加传播。 不修改 BKTEngine (flow.py 冻结)。
prompt.task:
改动: diagnostic_engine.py SkillMasteryStore.update() (约第 115 行)
当前: def update(self, skill: str, correct: bool) -> float: engine = self._get_engine(skill) obs = 1 if correct else 0 probs = engine.predict([obs]) new_mastery = probs[-1] self._mastery[skill] = new_mastery self._observation_count[skill] = self._observation_count.get(skill, 0) + 1 return new_mastery
改后: def update(self, skill: str, correct: bool, skill_graph: "SkillGraph | None" = None) -> float: engine = self._get_engine(skill) obs = 1 if correct else 0 probs = engine.predict([obs]) new_mastery = probs[-1] old_mastery = self._mastery.get(skill, 0.3) gain = new_mastery - old_mastery self._mastery[skill] = new_mastery self._observation_count[skill] = self._observation_count.get(skill, 0) + 1
# Phase 30: 知识图谱传播 if skill_graph and gain > 0: boosts = skill_graph.propagate(skill, gain, self._mastery) for dep_skill, new_val in boosts.items(): old = self._mastery.get(dep_skill, 0.3) if new_val > old: self._mastery[dep_skill] = new_val
return new_mastery

success_criteria.item: update("python_list", True) 后, python_dict 的 mastery 提升
gain=0 时 (答错), 不传播
skill_graph=None 时, 行为不变 (兼容旧调用)
